en.extract:
The Seram bush warbler (Locustella musculus) is a species of Old World warbler in the family Locustellidae. It is endemic to the island Seram in Indonesia where it is found on the forest floor.


References

International Ornithological Congress (July 25, 2020). "IOC World Bird List". Retrieved July 25, 2020.

The '''Seram bush warbler''' ('''''Locustella musculus''''') is a [[species]] of [[Old World warbler]] in the family [[Locustellidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to the island [[Seram Island|Seram]] in [[Indonesia]] where it is found on the forest floor.
